family_separation: not_established; both judges are OpenAI GPT-5.6 variants

isolation_incident.description: One initial judge_b packet-05 context reported viewing unrelated score files during a broad filename audit.
isolation_incident.disposition: All 21 outputs from that context were deleted. The packet was rerun in fresh contexts without listing or reading existing scores; only replacement outputs are committed.

adjudication.reason: The preregistered <=30% adjudication-rate gate had already failed at 95.5%, and expert-dependent gates were unavailable.

interpretation: Automated public-synthetic diagnostic only; not expert calibration and not evidence of release readiness.
